name: every rule scraped from every source namespace is bound to a native detector for write-time/audit-time enforcement
command: ruby -ryaml -e 'n=0; Dir[ARGV[0]+"/*/*.yaml"].each{|f| d=YAML.unsafe_load_file(f) rescue next; next unless d.is_a?(Hash); (d["rules"]||[]).each{|r| eb=r["enforced_by"]||[]; n+=1 unless eb.any?{|b| (b["tool"]||"").end_with?(".sh")}}}; STDERR.puts("rules_without_native=#{n}"); exit(n==0 ? 0 : 1)' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards" && echo every-rule-has-native-detector 1>&2
